description:
SELECT UserEntity.id AS UserEntity_id, UserEntity.firstName AS UserEntity_firstName,
       UserEntity.lastName AS UserEntity_lastName, UserEntity.email AS UserEntity_email,
       UserEntity.defaultAvatarUrl AS UserEntity_defaultAvatarUrl, UserEntity.isEmailVerified AS UserEntity_isEmailVerified,
       UserEntity.disabled AS UserEntity_disabled, UserEntity.passwordHash AS UserEntity_passwordHash,
       UserEntity.canImpersonate AS UserEntity_canImpersonate,
       UserEntity.canAccessFullAdminPanel AS UserEntity_canAccessFullAdminPanel, UserEntity.createdAt AS UserEntity_createdAt,
       UserEntity.updatedAt AS UserEntity_updatedAt, UserEntity.deletedAt AS UserEntity_deletedAt,
       UserEntity.locale AS UserEntity_locale
FROM core.user UserEntity
WHERE (((UserEntity.id = $1)))
  AND (UserEntity.deletedAt IS NULL)
LIMIT 1

description:
SELECT DataSourceEntity.workspaceId AS DataSourceEntity_workspaceId, DataSourceEntity.id AS DataSourceEntity_id,
       DataSourceEntity.label AS DataSourceEntity_label, DataSourceEntity.url AS DataSourceEntity_url,
       DataSourceEntity.schema AS DataSourceEntity_schema, DataSourceEntity.type AS DataSourceEntity_type,
       DataSourceEntity.isRemote AS DataSourceEntity_isRemote, DataSourceEntity.createdAt AS DataSourceEntity_createdAt,
       DataSourceEntity.updatedAt AS DataSourceEntity_updatedAt
FROM core.dataSource DataSourceEntity
WHERE ((DataSourceEntity.workspaceId = $1))
ORDER BY DataSourceEntity.createdAt DESC

data.db.name: default
data.db.statement: SELECT "DataSourceEntity"."workspaceId" AS "DataSourceEntity_workspaceId", "DataSourceEntity"."id" AS "DataSourceEntity_id", "DataSourceEntity"."label" AS "DataSourceEntity_label", "DataSourceEntity"."url" AS "DataSourceEntity_url", "DataSourceEntity"."schema" AS "DataSourceEntity_schema", "DataSourceEntity"."type" AS "DataSourceEntity_type", "DataSourceEntity"."isRemote" AS "DataSourceEntity_isRemote", "DataSourceEntity"."createdAt" AS "DataSourceEntity_createdAt", "DataSourceEntity"."updatedAt" AS "DataSourceEntity_updatedAt" FROM "core"."dataSource" "DataSourceEntity" WHERE (("DataSourceEntity"."workspaceId" = $1)) ORDER BY "DataSourceEntity"."createdAt" DESC
data.net.peer.name: rds-prod-eu.cluster-cr4iu4oi4q7b.eu-central-1.rds.amazonaws.com

description:
SELECT laTicket.name AS laTicket_name, laTicket.laTicketCode AS laTicket_laTicketCode,
       laTicket.laTicketId AS laTicket_laTicketId, laTicket.customerId AS laTicket_customerId,
       laTicket.estimationCalculated AS laTicket_estimationCalculated, laTicket.estimatedPrice AS laTicket_estimatedPrice,
       laTicket.estimationReasoning AS laTicket_estimationReasoning, laTicket.realValue AS laTicket_realValue,
       laTicket.estimatedPriceFlight AS laTicket_estimatedPriceFlight,
       laTicket.estimatedPriceAccommodation AS laTicket_estimatedPriceAccommodation, laTicket.id AS laTicket_id,
       laTicket.updatedAt AS laTicket_updatedAt, laTicket.createdAt AS laTicket_createdAt,
       laTicket.deletedAt AS laTicket_deletedAt, laTicket.createdBySource AS laTicket_createdBySource,
       laTicket.createdByWorkspaceMemberId AS laTicket_createdByWorkspaceMemberId, laTicket.createdByName AS laTicket_createdByName,
       laTicket.createdByContext AS laTicket_createdByContext, laTicket.position AS laTicket_position
FROM workspace_ebbbvb7s325pi03iqinui6at3._laTicket laTicket
WHERE laTicket.deletedAt IS NULL
ORDER BY laTicket_createdAt DESC NULLS LAST, laTicket_position ASC NULLS FIRST,
                                                                       laTicket_id ASC NULLS FIRST
LIMIT 61
